<div align="center">
  <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="100%" alt="header"/>
</div>

<br/>

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;AI & Data Science undergrad. I don't just run experiments —
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;**I ship systems.**

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;`AI engineering` &nbsp;×&nbsp; `backend architecture` &nbsp;×&nbsp; `cloud infrastructure`

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;Pipelines that survive production. ML in full-stack that actually scales.

<br/>

```
[1]  AI systems operating in production
[2]  Workflow and automation engines
[3]  Secure, cloud-native backend architectures
[4]  Performance-first engineering
```

> `//` &nbsp;Clean architecture beats feature bloat. If it scales cleanly, it survives.

<br/>
